title: Revolve Group Analyst Ratings and Price Targets
text: Analyst consensus on Revolve Group remains constructive. The 11 analysts covering the stock have a consensus Buy rating with an average price target of $29.73. Current analyst ratings breakdown: 9 Buy ratings, 6 Hold ratings, and 1 Sell rating. The median price target is $26.00, with the highest target at $37.00 and lowest at $19.00, reflecting a wide range of opinions on valuation and growth potential. Stifel recently raised its price target for RVLV to $33.00, maintaining a Buy rating. This recent action suggests confidence in the company's growth trajectory and execution. The analyst community expects earnings growth of 12.7% annually and revenue growth of 7.7% per annum, outpacing broader retail sector estimates. The 33.62% implied upside from current price targets reflects analyst optimism about the company's long-term prospects, though some investors note that valuation multiples remain elevated relative to historical levels and peer comparables.
